# GitHub Copilot Instructions

**Release date:** 2026-04-06 - **Canonical source:** https://github.com/indisoluble/AGENTS-spec

Follow `../AGENTS.md` for this repository.

`AGENTS.md` is the single source of truth and must be read first. Before any substantive response, plan, proposal, or code change, read it, perform the documentation review it requires, and follow its workflow and constraints.

Do not duplicate or override `AGENTS.md` here. If full compliance is blocked, state the constraint explicitly and proceed with best effort under `AGENTS.md`.
